name: Feta and Mint Bulgur Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Feta cheese, crumbled - about 2 oz
1 large Tomato, seeded and chopped into 1/2-inch pieces
2 tbsp Mint (basil or parsley), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add salt, then add bulgur (cook as you would pasta). Boil for 12 to 15 minutes, or until the bulgur is tender but not mushy.
2. Drain the bulgur very well and refrigerate until cool.
3. Meanwhile, place feta, tomato, green onion, cucumber, and mint in a medium-sized serving bowl. Gently toss.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper.
5. Add the cooled bulgur to the feta mixture and gently toss.
6. Toss with the olive oil dressing. Taste and add more salt if necessary.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve. The salad tastes best if made within a couple of hours after preparation.
